name: analytics-dark
description: Professional command-center dashboard aesthetic. Ultra-tight data hierarchy, semantic color, monochromatic precision. The Segment/Vercel/Linear analytics look — built for reading data fast, not looking decorative.
author: getdrip
signature_traits: Metric numbers in Geist Mono — monospaced digits prevent layout shift as values update
4:1 size ratio: metric at 48px, label at 12px — never equal weight
Three background layers only: #0A0A0B base → #111113 cards → #1A1A1F elevated
Color used only for semantic meaning — never decorative
No card shadows — background contrast separates surfaces
Sidebar at 60% text opacity — content area is always the visual hero
Charts: custom 6-color semantic palette, never Recharts defaults
Skeleton loaders must match the exact shape of the content they replace
Positive delta = emerald #10B981, Negative delta = rose #F43F5E — always with a directional arrow
No blue-purple gradients anywhere — blue (#3B82F6) is reserved for interactive elements only
